title: Masters County Championship Finals 2026
summary:
Three Notts Masters teams, having won all their matches in their respective Midlands Leagues, qualified to play in the Masters County Championship Finals held at Birmingham University over the weekend of 25/26th April.

Notts 50s team, having won the Championship Finals for the last two season, were again seeded 1st this year.
Their first match in the Final was against Wiltshire. Notts won all four Men’s, two Ladies and all four Mixed rubbers, resulting in a comfortable 10-2 win.

On the Sunday our 50s team played Worcestershire who previously beat Hertfordshire 7-5.
Notts won all four Men’s matches, one Ladies and three Mixed rubbers, resulting in an 8-4 win.
Our 50s team have now won the County Championship Finals on three successive years.

Notts 55s team, having won all their matches playing in the Midlands East division, played in a play-off against Worcestershire, the winners of Midlands West division. The match took place on neutral courts at Leicestershire on Sunday 29th March.
Worcestershire were unable to overcome the overall strength of the Notts side. Notts won all four Men’s and Ladies rubbers plus 1st Mixed, resulting in a 9-3 win for the Notts team.
The team then qualified to play in the Championship Finals, together with Notts 50s and 65s teams.
In the Finals. Notts 55s were up against a strong West of Scotland team. Four rubbers went to three ends, Notts pair Neil Franklin and Alan Bowmer won one of their matches 22-24, 21-16, 14-21. Loraine Buck and partner Karen Gleave won both of their ladies, resulting in a 3-9 loss.
On the Sunday our 55s team were up against last season’s winning team Hampshire. Only Notts pair Loraine Buck and Karen Gleave were able to worry their opponents.
The match resulted a 12-0 win to Hampshire.

Notts 65s team were up against last season’s winning team Lancashire 1st. Two Notts pairs, Julie Peart and Eileen Clarke lost in three ends. Jacqui Burton and Jerry Deacon won in three ends. Final result, 8-1 to Lancashire.
On the Sunday, the team played against Avon. The all-round strength of the Notts Ladies won the match for Notts. Notts won all three ladies in two straight sets, Jacqui Burton and Jerry Deacon, Eileen Clarke and Ian Price, both pairs won their Mixed in three sets. Resulting in a 5-4 win, Games 10-10, points 338-327.

50s Team:-
Carl Jennings.
Dave Barratt – Forest B.C.
Paula Wilson, Christine Gleave, Matt Tongue, Andy Cokayne – Bingham B.C.
Julie Gater – Mansfield Oaktree B.C.
Beverley Dolman – East Leake
Sarah Stevenson – Southwell B.C.

55s Team:
Karen Gleave – Crusader B.C.
Loraine Buck, Mike Storey, Martin Norman – Forest B.C.
Jane Smith, Sarah Heathcote – Bingham B.C.
Warwick Mooney – Beeston Valley B.C.
Neil Franklin – Mapperley Park B.C.

65s Team:-
Jacqui Burton, Julie Peart, Gill Maloney, Eileen Clarke – Chilwell B.C.
Ian Price, Sam Murphy – Chilwell B.C.
Jerry Deacon – Crusaders B.C.

title: Team Selections for 2026/27
summary: Captains confirm provisional squads for the upcoming Masters season.
